channel.title: Ntlm on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Ntlm on TLDRBins

item.title: SMB Enum
item.description: SMB Share Enum Login without password smbmap smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 smbmap -H 10.10.11.10 -u null smbclient smbclient -N -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ #After found an accessible share smbclient -N \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ #After connection #List all files in a share recurse ON ls #Download all files mask "" recurse ON prompt OFF mget * Login with password smbclient -L \\\\10.10.11.10\\ -U domain/username%password #After found an accessible share smbclient \\\\10.10.11.10\\share\\ -U domain/username%password Mount SMB Share sudo mount -t cifs "//10.

item.title: SMB Server
item.description: Start a SMB Server for File Transfer Common Use impacket-smbserver share . -smb2support With Creds impacket-smbserver share . -smb2support -username test -password test Note: Sometimes smb server with creds may not work For older Windows Machines impacket-smbserver share .
